what: Display vault registration form — fields depend on vault type chosen in step 00
why: Collect the information needed for the selected vault type: git URL + branch for git vaults, vault name only for local vaults

error_handling.description: Show validation errors next to the corresponding form fields

decisions.reason: Reuse single form component with conditional fields
decisions.rationale: VaultRegistrationForm renders git URL / branch fields only when vault_type='git'. Avoids a separate LocalVaultForm component.
